samples.xml_description:
```xml
<module id="width_8to16">
    <description>Converts 8-bit data input to 16-bit data output with synchronization and validity indication.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal used for synchronous operation.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal. Defined as 0 for reset and 1 for reset signal inactive.</input>
        <input id="valid_in">Input signal indicating the validity of the input data.</input>
        <input id="data_in" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input data to be converted.</input>
        <output id="valid_out">Output signal indicating the validity of the output data.</output>
        <output id="data_out" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit output data resulting from the width conversion.</output>
    </ports>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <register id="data_out" width="16" description="16-bit output data resulting from the width conversion."/>
        <register id="flag" width="1" description="Flag signal to indicate if the second valid data has been received."/>
        <register id="data_lock" width="8" description="Register to store the first valid data input until the second valid data arrives."/>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        Always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                data_out <= 16'h0;
                flag <= 1'b0;
                data_lock <= 8'h0;
            end else begin
                if (valid_in && !flag) begin
                    data_lock <= data_in;
                    flag <= 1'b1;
                end else if (valid_in && flag) begin
                    data_out <= {data_lock, data_in};
                    flag <= 1'b0;
                end
            end
        end
    </implementation>
</module>
```
